controlRecord.name: CR Party Relationship Administrative Plan
controlRecord.description: Handle and assign the day to day activities, capture time, costs and income for an operational unit within Party Lifecycle Management.

attributes.name: PartyRelationshipAdministrativePlanInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: PartyRelationshipAdministrativePlanInstanceRecordIdentificationIssuerReference
attributes.description: External authority-issued identifier (regulator, clearing system, registry).

attributes.name: PartyLife-cycleMaintenanceTask
attributes.description: Tasks performed to maintain/verify the life-cycle status

attributes.name: PartyRelationshipType
attributes.description: Defines the nature of the bank association with the party (e.g. customer, supplier)

attributes.name: PartyLife-cycleMaintenanceSchedule
attributes.description: Defines scheduled update/review tasks covering all tracked properties

attributes.name: PartyReference
attributes.description: Reference to the legal entity (typically the customer)

attributes.name: PartyLife-cycleMaintenanceTaskType
attributes.description: The type of task performed (e.g. on-boarding check, periodic refresh)

attributes.name: PartyRelationshipLifecyclePhase
attributes.description: Phase that characterizes the course of existence of a party relationship in a specific context.

attributes.name: PartyRelationshipLifecycleStatus
attributes.description: The state of relationship

attributes.name: PartyLife-cycleMaintenanceTaskResult
attributes.description: The outcome of the task  (will be used to update the Status and Status Record)

attributes.name: PartyLife-cycleMaintenanceWorkProducts
attributes.description: Work documentation, forms and schedules produced and referenced during the analysis

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Qualification Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: The Qualification is an activity that is performed as one aspect of carrying out the <CR>

attributes.name: PartyRelationshipAdministrativePlanInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: QualificationInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: QualificationReference
attributes.description: Links the qualification to a specific arrangement/agreement.

attributes.name: PartyReference
attributes.description: Identifies the customer, counterparty, or entity being qualified.

attributes.name: QualificationCriteria
attributes.description: Standards or benchmarks applied during qualification.

attributes.name: QualificationSupportingDocument
attributes.description: Data/documents used in the qualification assessment.

attributes.name: QualificationAssessmentMethod
attributes.description: Specifies whether the assessment was manual, automated, or external.

attributes.name: QualificationAssessmentDateandTime
attributes.description: Timestamp of when the qualification was performed.

attributes.name: QualificationStatus
attributes.description: Current state of the qualification (pending, active, expired, failed).

attributes.name: QualificationValidityPeriod
attributes.description: Start and end dates of qualification validity.

attributes.name: RequalificationRequirement
attributes.description: Conditions (e.g., event or schedule) requiring reassessment.

attributes.name: QualificationType
attributes.description: The type of qualification check  (e.g. PEP/watch list checks, credit worthiness, legal jeopardy)

attributes.name: DocumentDirectoryEntryInstanceReference
attributes.description:
Internal documentation linkage

Comment:
Reference to document directory entry managed by Document Directory SD

attributes.name: PublicDirectoryReference
attributes.description: External registry linkage

attributes.name: QualificationTaskDescription
attributes.description: Explains qualification activity

attributes.name: QualificationTaskRecord
attributes.description: Captures assessment details

attributes.name: QualificationTaskWorkProducts
attributes.description: Evidence generated

attributes.name: QualificationTaskResult
attributes.description: Outcome of qualification

attributes.name: SpecialistAgencyServiceReference
attributes.description: Identifies external agency

attributes.name: SpecialistAgencyorRegulatorServiceRequestResult
attributes.description: Captures regulator’s response

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Identity Proofing Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: The Identity Proofing is an activity that is performed as one aspect of carrying out the <CR>

attributes.name: PartyRelationshipAdministrativePlanInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: IdentityProofingInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: SpecialistAgencyServiceRequestResult
attributes.description: Result from the verification service request

attributes.name: IdentityProofingReference
attributes.description: A unique reference refers to an instance of BQ

attributes.name: IdentityProofingTaskResult
attributes.description: The outcome of the verification routine

attributes.name: DocumentDirectoryEntryInstanceReference
attributes.description: Reference to documents used for verification

attributes.name: IdentityProofingTaskWorkProducts
attributes.description: Work documentation, forms and schedules produced and referenced during  proofing (forms, logs, audit trails).

attributes.name: IdentityProofingMethod
attributes.description: The method used to verificate (e.g. public directory, document, 3rd party service providers)

attributes.name: SpecialistAgencyServiceReference
attributes.description: Reference to an external verification service (e.g. to perform background verification checks)

attributes.name: IdentityProofingTaskRecord
attributes.description: The record of a specific verification task

attributes.name: PublicDirectoryReference
attributes.description: Reference to an external verification source (e.g. for registered address/location verification)

attributes.name: IdentityProofingTaskDescription
attributes.description: Description of the verification routine

attributes.name: IdentityProofingValidityPeriod
attributes.description: The defined duration or contextual scope for which the identity proofing result remains valid before re-verification is required

attributes.name: PartyReference
attributes.description: Identifies the customer, counterparty, or entity being qualified.

attributes.name: IdentityProofingRenewalRequirement
attributes.description: Specifies when identity proofing must be re‑performed (time, event, or risk triggers)

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Documentation Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: The Documentation is an activity that is performed as one aspect of carrying out the <CR>

attributes.name: PartyRelationshipAdministrativePlanInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: DocumentationInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: DocumentStorageLocationorReference
attributes.description: System path or repository link

attributes.name: DocumentTimestamp
attributes.description: Upload or verification date/time

attributes.name: DocumentSourceorProviderReference
attributes.description: Origin of the document (claimant, third-party, system)

attributes.name: ClaimReference
attributes.description: Linked claim

attributes.name: DocumentType
attributes.description: Death certificate, invoice, proof of payment, correspondence

attributes.name: DocumentOwnerReference
attributes.description: Person/system responsible for document handling

attributes.name: DocumentStatus
attributes.description: Pending, Verified, Approved, Archived

attributes.name: DocumentIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the document

attributes.name: DocumentVersionReference
attributes.description: Tracks revisions of the document

attributes.name: DocumentRetentionPolicyReference
attributes.description: Links to retention schedule

attributes.name: DocumentClassification
attributes.description: Classification of document as Public, Internal, Confidential or Regulatory

attributes.name: DocumentRevocationorReplacement
attributes.description: Indicates if document was revoked or superseded

attributes.name: DocumentCaptureMethod
attributes.description: Means of capture (scan, upload, API, manual entry)
